toneNote: Full Moon week. Receive, complete, integrate — then rest. This is a culmination, not a launch.
quarterTheme: Personal Year 1 · Identity reset, planting seeds. Do not rush to harvest the wrong thing.

lunar.event: Full Moon in Capricorn — Mon June 29, 7:57pm EDT (8°14′ Capricorn)
lunar.sign: Moon waxes gibbous through Sagittarius into Capricorn, peaks Mon, then wanes through Aquarius–Pisces toward week's end
lunar.weather: The Strawberry/Capricorn Full Moon lands in your 12th-house territory, opposite the Cancer Sun — a release point around structure, rest, and what runs behind the scenes. Honors your Jupiter-in-12th and Projector wiring: the work this week is integration and receiving, not output. By Fri–Sat the waning Pisces moon brushes your natal Moon/ASC — deeply restorative.

transits.title: Jupiter enters Leo — Mon June 29 / 30
transits.note: The big one. Jupiter ingresses Leo and almost immediately approaches your natal Venus (2°10′ Leo, 6th house) — first stop in a year-long march through your full Leo stellium. Expansion in love, visibility, and how your work is seen. It arrives the SAME day as the Full Moon. Don't force it; let it come to you (Projector). Name what you're ready to receive.

transits.title: Chiron in Taurus over Lilith + North Node (ongoing)
transits.note: Still the active long-arc transit, sitting on your 2nd-house self-worth points. Every receiving practice this week is Chiron work. The Full Moon gives it a release valve — let something around 'I have to earn it' go.

transits.title: Sun in Cancer opposing the Capricorn Moon
transits.note: Home/family axis lit. A gentle pull between caretaking (you, the kids, the foster placements) and your own structure. Let dinner be simple this week.

actions: Fatty fish 2–3× this week (wild salmon or sardines) — Omega-3 index is low; this is the lever.
Adapalene Mon/Wed/Fri PM; Protini every night. Don't skip the Mon application before the busy week.
Take Vitamin D + K2 daily with a fat-containing meal; pair any iron-rich food with vitamin C.
Somatic: hand on heart each morning — 'It's safe to receive more.' This week Jupiter is literally bringing more; your body needs to not flinch.
TBM/mindset: free-write the fear under 'what if I'm ordinary?' on Full Moon night. Let it be witnessed, not fixed.
Practical: name one number you're ready to receive and say it out loud once. Receiving starts with claiming.
DemiPolished: plan the week's posts Mon — lead with personality/life-maxxing, ride the Jupiter-in-Leo visibility wave (but post from clarity, not a wave peak).
BGGG: plan Wed — stay on mission (toxins + Black health outcomes). One educational carousel, no lifestyle drift.
Communion Skin: spend 20 min on the working-title shortlist — early-stage naming only, no pressure to decide.
Jupiter is moving toward your Venus — note, don't chase. Journal: what does 'ready' feel like in my body?
One receptivity check-in midweek: am I open, or am I bracing?
One immediate-win exterior task (Phase 1) — small and finishable before the holiday weekend.
Water the cut-flower garden in the cool mornings; note which zinnias/dahlias are budding.

dp: Mon: plan DP captions + static posts
Schedule, don't post from a wave peak
bggg: Topic: one environmental toxin → Black health outcome
shoot: Both platforms must be planned first
Light load — it's a rest-leaning Harvest week

founderHour: Jupiter is about to walk across my Venus. If expansion in love, money, and visibility is already on its way to me — what would I have to believe about myself to let it land? (10 min, by hand, no editing.)
spiritual: Full Moon release. Light a white candle Monday night. Christian prayer anchors it — a prayer of release and thanksgiving for what's already coming. Hoodoo seals it: petition for receiving without earning, written and burned or kept on the altar. Then rest. The Pisces moon at week's end is for stillness, not striving.
mantra: It's already mine. I don't have to earn what's meant for me — I just have to let it in.
radar: June 29 — Jupiter enters Leo: year-long expansion begins, conjuncts your Venus first. Ask about love/visibility when ready.
July 26 — North Node into Aquarius: activates your Aquarius Ascendant for ~18 months. Identity + visibility chapter. Eclipses follow.
Ongoing — Chiron in Taurus over your North Node + Lilith: the self-worth healing arc. Worth a dedicated session.
